title: WASD Unlock All Recipes
description: This pack does what the name implies. However, this pack was specifically made in a way that it won’t end up breaking other installed datapacks.
body:
Unlock All Recipes

This pack does what the name implies. However, this pack was specifically made in a way that it won’t end up breaking other installed datapacks. How does this pack work? Basically, instead of using _/recipe give @s *_ which gives all recipes, including those added by other datapacks (which breaks them), it instead has a list of every possible recipe and gives them one at a time. This isn't much of an issue in 1.20.5 and later versions.

To install, follow the instructions contained in the “instructions.txt” file included in the download. If you are still having issues installing or want help knowing how to do something with the pack, ask for help on our discord. Fully Multiplayer compatible!
